data.body: B2 (6386) and B4 (66ff) plan-review now PASS. B2 mechanism finalized as a contextvar sink at the single _seam.append_event boundary (NOT kwarg-threading through 8 layers) — default None commits per-event unchanged (guardrail 1 structurally guaranteed: only the importer sets the sink); Pass 2b (links) stays per-event due to add_dependency read-after-write (reciprocal relates_to + _is_active_link TOCTOU), Pass 2e stays per-event (stateful). B1 #459 has Verified +1; LLM-Review blocked by repo-wide review-bot outage (infra veto, not code). Watcher launched for auto-retry+submit on bot recovery. docs/scale-envelope.md rewritten to the import-only carve-out.
